_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002.
_meta.relation_to_classic: No classic counterpart — observations are exposed only via MCP (list_observations) in the classic generation. Loom is the first HTTP surface. observation_id replaces id at the entity primary-key level.

shape_decl.request_type: GET; query params: limit, offset, file_path, file_id
shape_decl.rationale: ObservationLoom = ObservationDict with id renamed to observation_id; cross-entity refs (file_id, source_issue_id) keep their names. DROPS MCP's 'stats' sibling per the strict envelope; consumers needing stats hit /api/observations/stats.
